scripts.server1: cd servers && cross-env PORT=3001 node src/server.js
scripts.server2: cd servers && cross-env PORT=3002 node src/server.js
scripts.server3: cd servers && cross-env PORT=3003 node src/server.js
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run server1" "npm run server2" "npm run server3" "npm run loadbalancer"
